title: Toy Story 3
desc: Andy is heading to college and his toys are moving to the attic. Or, so they think! When Andy's mom accidentally throws away the toys.

title: A Present For The Queen
desc: Alice searches for a Christmas gift for the Queen of Hearts.

title: New Friends
desc: Tinker Bell meets a winter fairy named Periwinkle and together they explore the mysterious winter woods!

title: Flounder Loves Ariel
desc: Original story illustrated in a unique art style that captures iconic film moments as told by the princess's special friend. This is meant to inspire board book editions. Cover included. AGES 0-4

title: Lost At Sea
desc: A summer boat trip turns into a day of tropical-island survival when the Flynn-Fletcher family gets shipwrecked! Making the best of the situation, Phineas and Ferb build an elaborate tree house. But will these unlikely castaways be able to find a way off the island? Featuring exciting full-color art from the show and word for word narration, this Level 3 reader is perfect for Phineas and Ferb fans!

title: Zootopia
desc: Welcome to Zootopia, a animal city where anyone can be anything! When Judy Hopps-the first-ever bunny cop-arrives, she discovers that being a bunny on a police force of tough animals isn't so easy.

title: Friends Are Forever
desc: Luca, Alberto, and Giulia know that friends are forever! Join them to see all the fun things friends can do together!

title: Huey, Dewey, And Louie's Rainy Day Adventure
desc: It may be raining outside, but that won't stop Huey, Dewey and Louie from having fun at Uncle Donald's house! The boys come up with some great ideas: painting, drinking hot cocoa, playing games, etc.

title: Undercover Princess
desc: Enjoy Disney Junior stories with Bingo, Rolly, Mira, and Mickey! Each story is perfect for a quick read in about five minutes. Fun adventures await!

title: A Day with Moana
desc: Read along with Disney! Join favorite Disney and Pixar girls on adventures solve toy cases, play with Moana, and enjoy short stories ideal for bedtime or any time!

title: Cloud Country
desc: Sitting there, among the clouds, looking down and day dreaming is... a little cloudlet. Gale would like nothing more than to make one real cloud shape. But instead, she creates something different.

title: Lava
desc: Inspired by the isolated beauty of tropical islands and the explosive allure of ocean volcanoes, LAVA is a love story that takes place over millions of years.

title: Over There
desc: Over There is a drama series following six young American soldiers facing the horrors of the Iraq War, dealing with combat, injuries, and personal challenges during their tour of duty.

title: All Stuffed Up
desc: Doc diagnoses Teddy B with a case of the 'Dusty-Musties.' His dust triggers allergies! Doc runs Teddy B through the washing machine. Once he's dust-free, Doc gives Teddy B back to her little brother.

title: Brave Dragon
desc: While playing with Doc and the other toys, Stuffy takes a spill in the park and gets covered in prickly burs. Doc fixes him up, but something is not right...Stuffy doesn't want to play!

title: Blame It On The Rain
desc: Alma's stuffed cow, Moo Moo, gets soaked when she is left outside in the rain. Alma is sad and Moo Moo is mooo-serable! Can Doc help?

title: Brontosaurus Breath
desc: After Donny 'feeds' his toy dino, Bronty, a salami sandwich for lunch, all the other toys run and hide. Doc diagnoses Bronty with Stinkysalamibreath, his breath is just too smelly to be around!

title: Caught Blue-Handed
desc: Chilly arrives in Doc's clinic covered with blue spots! Doc has to track down the reason for this case of Mystery Pox and help her friend Chilly.
